context: Mucocele of Appendix mucocele =   macroscopic descriptive term for cystic dilatation of appendix / gallbladder / sinus cavity / salivary gland caused by an accumulation of mucin Etiology: √  mild luminal dilatation rarely > 2 cm in diameter secreting tumor √  marked luminal distention Cx:  perforation with mucous seeding (in 20%) √  severe appendiceal distention by mucin Cx:  6% risk of perforation + peritoneal implantations Prevalence:   0.07-0.25% of appendectomy specimens; 8% of appendiceal tumors Mean age:  55 years; M÷F = 1÷4 to 1÷1 Associated with:   colonic adenocarcinoma (6-fold risk),
